title: SQL Mission 5: Filter Early In CTE

initialState.content:
-- Mission 5 Guidelines
-- CTE should filter rows first
-- Then aggregate in outer query

WITH filtered_orders AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    total_amount
  FROM orders
  WHERE
    -- TODO status/date filters
)
SELECT
  customer_id,
  -- TODO aggregate
FROM filtered_orders
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total_spend DESC;
